versions.changelog_entry: Phase I (reduced) operator docs in RUNBOOK; HANDOFF I+K closure; CHANGELOG VERIFY bucket tying four integrity-report claims to enforced code paths (encoder revision, config/preregistration hash, corpus hash v2+v1 bridge, hypothesis/BH/convergence integrity); versions bump; full test+coverage + fixture analyze spot-check + confirmatory preregistration gate + gitnexus analyze --embeddings.

11-phase (A-K) implementation plan covering all 17 accepted findings from the 2026-04-25 adversarial architecture review (Phase A Full-Stack pass + Phase B Builder pass). Closes specific gaps in mediaite-ghostink-integrity-report.docx claims around (1) sentence-transformers revision pinning, (2) analysis-config hash coverage for pelt_penalty / bocpd_hazard_rate / bocpd_min_run_length / min_articles_for_period, (3) corpus_hash determinism via ORDER BY content_hash with corpus_custody schema_version=2 and one-cycle v1/v2 dual-persist, (4) statistical-test integrity via HypothesisTest extension (n_pre, n_post, n_nan_dropped, skipped_reason, degenerate) with NaN drop at run_hypothesis_tests entry and BH denominator excluding skipped+degenerate. Adds: Repository internal threading.Lock with concurrency integration test (Phase E), Field validators and CHECK migration on word_count (Phase F), excluded_sections cross-config invariant (Phase G), confirmatory-mode strict JSON decode (Phase H), integrity-report scoping amendments (Phase I), and five low-priority defensive items (Phase J). Records 9 Builder rebuttals as explicit Out-of-Scope so future agents do not re-litigate (R6, R7, R12, R14, R16, R17, R24, R25, R26).
